actions.script: var selectors = ${selectors_json}; var results = []; for (var i = 0; i < selectors.length; i++) { var sel = selectors[i]; var result = { name: sel.name, selector: sel.selector, value: null }; try { if (sel.remove_selector && sel.remove_selector.length > 0) { sel.remove_selector.forEach(function(rs) { document.querySelectorAll(rs).forEach(function(el) { el.remove(); }); }); } if (sel.js_query) { try { result.value = eval(sel.js_query); } catch(e) {} } if (!result.value) { if (sel.is_multiple_value) { var els = document.querySelectorAll(sel.selector); result.value = Array.from(els).map(function(el) { return el.getAttribute('content') || el.getAttribute('href') || el.getAttribute('src') || el.innerText.trim(); }); } else { var el = document.querySelector(sel.selector); if (el) result.value = el.getAttribute('content') || el.getAttribute('href') || el.getAttribute('src') || el.innerText.trim(); } } } catch(e) { result.error = e.message; } results.push(result); } return JSON.stringify(results)
return JSON.stringify({ title: document.title, url: window.location.href, domain: window.location.hostname })
